message: 🌱 Add vitess: vtgate queries randomly routed to unhealthy or non-existent mission (#584)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vitess-7981-vtgate-queries-randomly-routed-to-unhealthy-or-non-existent-replicas",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vitess: vtgate queries randomly routed to unhealthy or non-existent replicas",
+    "description": "vtgate queries randomly routed to unhealthy or non-existent replicas. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vitess deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your vitess version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nhelm list -n vitess 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working vitess installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vitess configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess\n```\n#### Overview of the Issue\n\nqueries sent to `` like `SET ..` are sent randomly to alphabetically first keyspace replicas or keyspaces without replicas or keyspaces with all replicas unhealthy."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for vtgate queries randomly routed to unhealthy or non-existent",
+        "description": "Rather than returning the error, we will just log the error as the intention for executing the query it to validate the current setting and eventually ignore it anyways. There is no benefit of returning the error back to client.\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"vtgate queries randomly routed to unhealthy or non-existent\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Rather than returning the error, we will just log the error as the intention for executing the query it to validate the current setting and eventually ignore it anyways. There is no benefit of returning the error back to client.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vitess",
+      "graduated",
+      "storage",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/8004"
+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
